SEARCH
Package assignment1

Class DriversLicense

java.lang.Object
assignment1.DriversLicense
public class DriversLicense extends Object
Represents an Ontario Driver's License. This class stores all relevant license data and provides methods to compute license-related information such as days to expiry, driver age and height conversion.
Author:
Boris Gueye

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DriversLicense()
    The No-arg constructor creates a DriversLicense with default values based on the fictional character Arthur Leywin from The Beginning After The End.
    DriversLicense(String lastName, String firstName, char sex, LocalDate dateOfBirth, int height, String address, String city, String province, String postalCode)
    The partial constructor creates a DriversLicense with personal details provided and all other fields set to default values.
    DriversLicense(String lastName, String firstName, String address, String city, String province, String postalCode, String licenseNumber, LocalDate dateOfIssue, LocalDate expiryDate, String referenceNumber, int height, char sex, String licenseClass, String restrictions, LocalDate dateOfBirth)
    Full constructor.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    computeDaysSinceIssue()
    Computes the number of days since the license was issued based on the system date and the date of issue.
    int
    computeDaysToExpiry()
    Computes the number of days until the license expires.
    int
    computeDriverAge()
    Computes the current age of the license holder in years based on the system date and the date of birth.
    double
    computeHeightInInches()
    Converts the license holder's height from centimeters to inches.
    double
    computeYearsSinceIssue()
    Computes the number of years since the license was issued based on the system date and the date of issue.

  • Constructor Details

    • DriversLicense

      public DriversLicense()
      The No-arg constructor creates a DriversLicense with default values based on the fictional character Arthur Leywin from The Beginning After The End. Date of birth defaults to 30 years before the current system date. Date of issue defaults to the current system date. Expiry date defaults to 5 years after the current system date.

    • DriversLicense

      public DriversLicense(String lastName, String firstName, char sex, LocalDate dateOfBirth, int height, String address, String city, String province, String postalCode)
      The partial constructor creates a DriversLicense with personal details provided and all other fields set to default values. Date of issue defaults to the current system date. Expiry date defaults to 5 years after the current system date. License class defaults to "G" and restrictions default to "None".
      Parameters:
      lastName - the last name of the license holder
      firstName - the first name of the license holder
      sex - the sex of the license holder
      dateOfBirth - the date of birth of the license holder
      height - the height of the license holder in centimeters
      address - the street address of the license holder
      city - the city of the license holder
      province - the province of the license holder
      postalCode - the postal code of the license holder

    • DriversLicense

      public DriversLicense(String lastName, String firstName, String address, String city, String province, String postalCode, String licenseNumber, LocalDate dateOfIssue, LocalDate expiryDate, String referenceNumber, int height, char sex, String licenseClass, String restrictions, LocalDate dateOfBirth)
      Full constructor. Creates a DriversLicense with all fields specified. All other constructors chain to this constructor.
      Parameters:
      lastName - the last name of the license holder
      firstName - the first name of the license holder
      address - the street address of the license holder
      city - the city of the license holder
      province - the province of the license holder
      postalCode - the postal code of the license holder
      licenseNumber - the unique license number
      dateOfIssue - the date the license was issued
      expiryDate - the date the license expires
      referenceNumber - the document reference number
      height - the height of the license holder in centimeters
      sex - the sex of the license holder
      licenseClass - the class of the driver's license (e.
      restrictions - any restrictions on the license
      dateOfBirth - the date of birth of the license holder

  • Method Details

    • computeDaysToExpiry

      public int computeDaysToExpiry()
      Computes the number of days until the license expires. Returns a positive number if the license is still valid, 0 if it expires today, and a negative number if already expired.
      Returns:
      the number of days until the license expires

    • computeDriverAge

      public int computeDriverAge()
      Computes the current age of the license holder in years based on the system date and the date of birth.
      Returns:
      the age of the license holder in years

    • computeDaysSinceIssue

      public int computeDaysSinceIssue()
      Computes the number of days since the license was issued based on the system date and the date of issue.
      Returns:
      the number of days since the license was issued

    • computeYearsSinceIssue

      public double computeYearsSinceIssue()
      Computes the number of years since the license was issued based on the system date and the date of issue.
      Returns:
      the number of years since the license was issued as a double

    • computeHeightInInches

      public double computeHeightInInches()
      Converts the license holder's height from centimeters to inches.
      Returns:
      the height of the license holder in inches

    • printLicenseReport

      public String printLicenseReport()
      Generates a formatted report of all license details including personal information, license information, and computed values.
      Returns:
      a formatted String containing all license details and computed values

      public String getLastName()
      Returns the last name of the license holder.
      Returns:
      the last name
